recap: Created is-bats predicate (ft=bats modeline + .bats extension detection), full test suite, and fixed modelines + noRunZsh disables in both helper files.

Replaced *.bats glob routing in git-file-lint and lint-bats with is-bats calls; updated lintstaged.config.js glob to include extensionless helpers; added two regression tests (mocking is-bats) and fixed pre-existing SC2076/SC2164 violations in git-file-lint.bats.
